title: Looking for Financial Analyst at HDFC Ergo Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Looking for Financial Analyst at HDFC Ergo Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with HDFC Ergo Digital Technologies! We are hiring a Financial Analyst for our Jaipur team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About HDFC Ergo Digital Technologies:
HDFC Ergo Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Ind AS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HDFC Ergo Digital Technologies!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
